2068987304983847087.full_text:
🚨LEAVE A FEW CENTURIES FOR US TOO, BRO😆🚨

Question :- When you were walking back after scoring a century, did Virat Kohli say something to you near the boundary? What was that moment?

Daryl Mitchell :-"Yeah, I was in good form and scoring well, so when I was walking back after the hundred, Virat came up smiling and said, ‘Leave a few centuries for us too, brother.’ I laughed and told him, ‘Don’t worry, I still score less centuries than you.’ It was a light-Fun moment  that’s the beauty of cricket, fierce competition but mutual respect at the same time."

2068965089756234072.full_text:
🚨VIRAT KOHLI & JAMES ANDERSON DISCUSSED THEIR RETIREMENT🚨

Question :- One of your pictures with Virat Kohli went viral where both of you were laughing together. What was the conversation about?

James Anderson: :-"We were actually talking about retirement plans. I asked him when he’s planning to Retirement and he said, ‘You tell me first.’ We both had a laugh because after all these battles on the field,I honestly miss those days  great competition and great moments."

2069015260565041558.full_text:
Anukul Roy is currently 27. In the old photo, Vaibhav clearly looks around 7–8 years old, which lines up with his official DOB (27 March 2011).

So this photo was taken in 2018:

Vaibhav’s age in 2018 ≈ 7.25 years
Add 8 years → ≈ 15.25 years in 2026

That matches his current age of 15 perfectly. The timeline, official DOB, and Anukul’s age all align with the photo. There is no age fraud. 🤷🏻‍♂️

2069013566326182004.full_text: Mohammad Kaif said: "Gautam Gambhir likes Ishan Kishan. I am telling you this right now. When I talked to him once before when we were in Sri Lanka, we were working in Sri Lanka, and there was a mention of Ishan Kishan and KL Rahul. He chose Ishan Kishan's name over KL Rahul. We were sitting in the commentary box, and we even showed it on the show. He likes Ishan Kishan because we were firm on the fact that he is a proven player at number five or six. He was injured, that's why Ishan Kishan came, but now KL Rahul is fit, he is a proven player, so he will play."
